title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
description: Build and scale ML systems that power Stripe's fraud detection, risk assessment, and financial intelligence. Work with petabyte-scale datasets and deploy models serving billions of predictions daily. You will collaborate with world-class engineers to push the boundaries of applied machine learning in fintech.

title: Staff UI Engineer, Guest Experience
description: Lead the architecture and implementation of next-generation UI components for Airbnb's global guest experience. Define technical strategy for our design system, mentor engineers, and partner with design to create delightful, accessible interfaces used by 150M+ guests worldwide.

title: Data Scientist, Recommendations
description: Build and improve the recommendation models that power what 260M subscribers watch next. Work on content-based filtering, matrix factorization, and deep learning approaches to personalization. You'll run large-scale A/B experiments and directly influence product decisions affecting billions of viewing hours.

title: NLP Research Scientist
description: Advance the frontier of natural language understanding and generation. Design and train large language models, develop new alignment techniques, and publish cutting-edge research. Your work will directly shape the capabilities and safety properties of the world's most capable AI systems.

title: Senior Product Designer, AI Core
description: Shape the future of design tooling as AI transforms how products are built. Own complex design problems end-to-end, from discovery through delivery. Partner with engineers and PMs to integrate intelligent features into Figma while preserving the craft and joy of the design process.

title: Backend Engineer, Payments Infrastructure
description: Build the resilient, high-throughput payment processing infrastructure that enables 1M+ merchants to do business globally. Design event-driven systems, ensure financial data integrity, and scale services to handle peak traffic during Black Friday. You'll work on PCI-compliant systems touching trillions of dollars in GMV.

title: Computer Vision Engineer
description: Develop the perception algorithms that allow Tesla's Autopilot and FSD systems to see and understand the world. Work on 3D object detection, semantic segmentation, and occupancy prediction from multi-camera systems. Your code ships to millions of vehicles and directly contributes to autonomous driving safety.

title: Cloud Infrastructure Architect
description: Architect the multi-cloud data platform infrastructure that's redefining the data warehouse. Design systems for cross-cloud data sharing, global replication, and elastic compute at exabyte scale. Drive technical strategy for our next-generation storage and networking architecture across AWS, Azure, and GCP.

title: AI Product Manager
description: Define and execute the vision for Notion AI — the intelligent layer powering millions of knowledge workers. Work with engineering and design to ship AI features that feel like magic, conduct user research, analyze usage data, and communicate complex technical capabilities to a global audience.

title: DevOps / MLOps Engineer
description: Build the MLOps platform that democratizes access to state-of-the-art AI. Automate model training pipelines, manage large-scale GPU clusters, and build developer-friendly tooling used by 5M+ ML practitioners worldwide. Shape the infrastructure that hosts the largest open-source model hub on the internet.

title: Full Stack Engineer, Growth
description: Drive user acquisition and activation as an engineer on Linear's Growth team. Build experiments, optimize onboarding flows, develop integrations, and analyze funnel data. Ship product-led growth features that have measurable impact on signups, activation, and retention for one of the most beloved developer tools.

title: Security Engineer, Zero Trust
description: Design and implement zero trust network access solutions protecting thousands of enterprise customers. Work on Cloudflare's SASE platform, build cryptographic protocols, and defend against nation-state threat actors. Your work directly secures the Internet infrastructure relied on by millions of businesses globally.

title: Quantitative Researcher
description: Develop, test, and deploy quantitative trading strategies using statistical modeling and ML techniques. Analyze enormous financial datasets, build predictive models, and work alongside traders to generate alpha. You'll collaborate with brilliant engineers and researchers to solve some of the hardest problems in quantitative finance.

title: iOS Engineer, Core Experience
description: Shape the core user experience on the world's most important computing platform. Work on foundational iOS frameworks, optimize performance for hundreds of millions of devices, and push the boundaries of what's possible on Apple Silicon. Your contributions will be experienced billions of times daily by iPhone users worldwide.

title: Data Engineer, Real-Time Analytics
description: Build the real-time data infrastructure that enables Databricks customers to build AI and analytics products at scale. Design streaming data pipelines, optimize Spark query performance, and contribute to the Lakehouse platform used by thousands of data-driven organizations including Apple, Comcast, and Shell.
